{{Quote|Sad soul. What were you thinking? Were you ''defending'' us? Or were you simply lashing out, taking life as life was taken from you?|Shaak Ti reflects on Ryyk after his death|<ref name="JST" />}}
'''Ryyk''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] prisoner imprisoned on [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Shogar Tok]]'s headquarters prison on [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]].

==Biography==
Ryyk had gone insane after watching his family being massacred by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]]; this led to him occasionally going into uncontrollable berserker rages.

[[File:TheDeathofRyyk.jpg|thumb|left|Ryyk killed by a [[Scrange/Legends|scrange]].]]

During his sentence, he befriended fellow prisoners [[Lyshaa]] and [[Sagoro Autem]]. When the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] attacked the base, the three found the perfect opportunity to escape. However, they came face-to-face with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]], whose [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Fe Sun]], was killed by Lyshaa. Luckily, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] sided with them. While Lyshaa and Ti went to kill Tok, Ryyk, Autem, and Vos went to disable the fortress defense. During the attempt, however, Ryyk was killed by a [[Scrange/Legends|scrange]].
